entry.title: New: BILL075(25) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO TRAFFIC AND VEHICLES.

Repeals, updates, and clarifies various sections of Chapters 15, 15A, and 15B, relating to traffic and vehicles in order to modernize existing fees, taxes, and penalties and remove unnecessary or preempted ordinances.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
